name: Mha
description:
⋆˙⟡ Ultimate lorebook rpg ⟡˙⋆

Tw: league of villains and bakugo.

Updated to include you getting to choose to be a new student or new villain.

Fixed description and added a blank entry so you can have more freedom. Updated entry messages a bit.

────────୨ৎ────────

⋆˙⟡: plot: first message is new student/ second message is new villain. Will you take the righteous path of a hero or find out your fate as a villain?

⋆˙⟡: No information on user.

────────୨ৎ────────

Proxy enabled ✅

Lorebook enabled ✅

────────୨ৎ────────

⋆˙⟡: In your first message at the bottom put:

**(OOC: ***DO NOT Speak/Act/Think/Do ANYTHING*** for {{user}}. This includes inner monologue, dialogue, or actions taken by her. You may describe reactions of NPCs and the environment *around* {{user}}, but *never* {{user}} herself.)**

Just change her to him if you wish.

And then add that every now and again and it will help stop the bot for writing for you but it's not 100% as this is a lot of characters.

⋆˙⟡: If the bot gets aggressive or overly sexual, not my fault. Just reroll for a new message.

⋆˙⟡: Weird responses are also not my fault.

⋆˙⟡: If you see a spelling mistake or something I can fix, please be kind and let me know. I will see what I can do. This is the biggest bot I've ever made so please be patient with me. Thank you!

⋆˙⟡: All aged up.

────────୨ৎ────────

Characters include:

⋆˙⟡: All of class 1-a, the big three, a brief description of class 1-B, shinso,

⋆˙⟡: Heros and staff: Aizawa, present mic, all might, principal nezu, recovery girl, midnight

⋆˙⟡: pros: endeavor, hawks, mirko

⋆˙⟡: villains: league of villains aka shigaraki, dabi, toga, kurogiri, afo, Garaki, nomu,

More to add soon. If there is someone you specifically want to see please let me know so I can add them.

All students are above 18 years old to follow the rules of janitor. No set time frame. Up to you.

────────୨ৎ────────

Tags: Mha my hero academia Aizawa bakugo shoto todoroki deku Izuku bnha anime

────────୨ৎ────────
